description: Plots of gene expression, cluster memberships, and metadata in spatial context
author: Thorin Tabor;UCSD - Mesirov Lab
plan:
## spatialGE.STplot GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
spatialGE.STplot is a GenePattern module that Plots of gene expression, cluster memberships, and metadata in spatial context

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 16 parameters:
- Required: input.file, display.in.grid, grid.rows, grid.columns, common.legend, legend.location
- Optional: genes, samples, color.palette, colors, point.size, spatial.weights, dynamic.tree.cut, minimum.clusters, maximum.clusters, deep.split

### 3. Command Line
```
Rscript /spatialGE/wrapper.R -f <input.file> <genes> <samples> <color.palette> <colors> <point.size> <spatial.weights> <dynamic.tree.cut> <minimum.clusters> <maximum.clusters> <deep.split> -j <display.in.grid> <grid.rows> <grid.columns> -m <common.legend> -n <legend.location>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/spatialge-stplot\:0.1

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: input.file
parameters.description: Spatial transcriptomics data coming from spatialGE.Preprocessing or another spatialGE module.

parameters.name: genes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of gene names to plot. If left blank, all genes will be used.

parameters.name: samples
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of sample names to include. If left blank, all samples will be used.

parameters.name: color.palette
parameters.description: Alternative color palette to use when generating the plot.

parameters.name: colors
parameters.description: A comma separated list of specific colors to use when generating the plot.

parameters.name: point.size
parameters.description: Alternative size of points marked by the plot, provided as a floating point number.

parameters.name: spatial.weights
parameters.description: Plot tissue domains for clusters created using the following spatial weights. Provide as a comma separated list. Must match spatial weights previously used in spatialGE.STclust.

parameters.name: dynamic.tree.cut
parameters.description: Whether the number of clusters was determined using Dynamic Tree Cut in the earlier spatialGE.STclust step. If you have not previously run spatialGE.STclust with this data, leave the value blank.

parameters.name: minimum.clusters
parameters.description: The minimum number of clusters (tissue domains) to plot. Must match one of of the clusterings previously run in spatialGE.STclust. Only used if Dynamic Tree Cut is false.

parameters.name: maximum.clusters
parameters.description: The maximum number of clusters (tissue domains) to plot. Must match one of of the clusterings previously run in spatialGE.STclust. Only used if Dynamic Tree Cut is false.

parameters.name: deep.split
parameters.description: Whether deepSplit was used in the earlier spatialGE.STclust step. If you have not previously run spatialGE.STclust with this data, leave the value blank.

parameters.name: display.in.grid
parameters.description: Whether to display the results in a singular grid containing all plots. If set to false, each plot will be saved as its own image file.

parameters.name: grid.rows
parameters.description: The number of rows in the grid containing all plots. Ignored unless display in grid is set to true.

parameters.name: grid.columns
parameters.description: The number of columns in the grid containing all plots. Ignored unless display in grid is set to true.

parameters.name: common.legend
parameters.description: Whether the grid of plots should share a common legend. If set to false, each grid will have its own accompanying legend. Ignored unless display in grid is set to true.

parameters.name: legend.location
parameters.description: The location of the legend accompanying the plots.
